title: rootless: do not create a user namespace if not needed
body:
do not create a user namespace if we already have the capabilities we
need for pulling and storing an image.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/637

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @mtrmac I believe an hope that we will only attempt to use the UserNS if the user is non-root and they are attempting to use containers/storage.
